reasoning: The current absorbance is 2.0, which seems unusually high given the other parameters. I will increase the path length to see if it affects the absorbance.
Doubling the path length doubled the absorbance, suggesting a linear relationship between absorbance and path length. I will now test the effect of changing the concentration.
The absorbance has increased proportionally with both path length and concentration. No further testing is needed as the Beer-Lambert Law fits the observed data.
